description: A pair of open-toed, black and brown sandals with blue, yellow and red accents, has slip-on stylingLeather, thong style upper, has a toe separator, attached to a midfoot strap with patterned overlay and stitch detailSoft footbed with branding on the heelTextured outsole with an upraised heelWarranty: 30 days from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defects only
